message:
fix(llm): address round 4 review issues in retry, stream-timeout, and client

- Race iterator.return() against 1s timeout to prevent hang on cleanup
- Apply jitter BEFORE maxDelayMs cap so delays never exceed the max
- Validate negative/NaN streamReadTimeoutMs in Client constructor
- Extract .message from non-Error throws instead of producing [object Object]
- Validate degenerate retryLLMCall options (negative maxRetries/baseDelayMs/maxDelayMs)
- Register abort listener before setTimeout to close race window
- Document onRetry attempt parameter as 1-indexed in JSDoc
- Add tests: retry_after:-1 fallback, 408 retryability, changing retry_after,
  jitter<=maxDelayMs, iterator.return() throw swallowed, negative option validation,
  negative/NaN streamReadTimeoutMs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
